parsed.rationale: The image displays a molecular structure where each blue sphere (atom) is connected to exactly three other spheres via brown rods (bonds). This consistent connectivity across the entire structure indicates that every atom has a coordination number of 3. Therefore, each atom is directly connected to 3 other atoms.
